apps.name: Cistern
apps.tagline: Budgeting as cash-flow weather: reservoirs and tide forecasts instead of ledgers, forecasting shortfalls before they hit.
apps.target_user: Paycheck-to-paycheck user who avoids their banking app.
open_risks: Uniqueness vs. ReturnWise flagged as unverified — names-only check.

apps.name: Heddle
apps.tagline: Thread-routing/weaving puzzle with a solvability-verified procedural generator; solved puzzles become woven pattern art.
apps.target_user: Casual puzzle player wanting something warm and tactile, not match-3.

apps.name: Marginalia
apps.tagline: On-device LLM remixes a user's own journal text into generative typographic poster art.
apps.target_user: People who journal but never do anything with it.
open_risks: Uniqueness vs. Proof flagged as unverified.

apps.name: Skyglass
apps.tagline: AR stargazing app driven by real orbital mechanics, not a static star chart, with a persistent observation log.
apps.target_user: Parent/hobbyist doing backyard stargazing with a kid.

apps.name: Thicket
apps.tagline: Plant propagation lineage tracker (parent→cutting graph) with on-device CV leaf-health diagnosis.
apps.target_user: Someone who propagates/trades cuttings and wants lineage memory, not generic watering reminders.

apps.name: Undersong
apps.tagline: Short voice stories pinned to real physical places, discovered by proximity, decaying/resurfacing seasonally.
apps.target_user: Someone who wants a human layer on places they walk daily.
open_risks: Riskiest pick — cold-start problem and biggest local-first tension; V1 scoped down to seeded content + own-story loop, live multi-user discovery pushed to roadmap.

apps.name: Undertow
apps.tagline: Living reef diorama idle game where growth is coral/kelp/biomass, not a number-stack.
apps.target_user: Casual player wanting a calming 5-minute check-in.
